text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket trains hard for the Osaka Hai.
Despite her efforts though, her time is not
improving.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to break through the wall she faces, we
hold a scrimmage with Narita Taishin and Biwa
Hayahide. Unfortunately, she still doesn't
improve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket remarks positively that they ran a
great race, but Biwa Hayahide counters, asking if
she's not upset at the loss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though confused about the meaning of that
question, Winning Ticket tries to stay eager to
work hard.
